productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Yellow Teen Kidswear
description: CompositionYellow  round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with gathers on the sides, multi-coloured stripes from waist to hemline, appliqued seal on centre back and graphic on the front with glitter letteringFittingRegularWash care1. Machine wash separately in cold water2. Use mild detergent3. Do not bleach4. Avoid soaking and remove promptly5. Line dry inside out in shade6. Warm iron only, do not iron directly on print/embroideryBring out your bright, sunny side with this yellow tee from disney. The sunny yellow colour and the bold peach, red and blue stripes reminds you of of a beachy summer. The butterfly seal appliqued on the centre back and the glittery disney lettering on the front all encourage you to get carried away in the summer mood. Team this up with jeans, shorts or a mini denim skirt and lifestyle shoes available in a wide range at myntra, for a real sunny time with your friends.
